body.docName: 采购付款预入库单导入
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/import 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/import 
 ## 接口描述 
功能描述： 将预入库信息导入至采购付款应用。

接口注意事项：批量导入接口，允许部分成功，导入上限为100。

采购付款与连接器的交互流程图如下：
![预入库单导入 (4).png](https://s3gw.cmbchina.com/lw36.01-public-prd/public-5531217f-9568-47f4-9cdb-65c06fd26856) 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"purchaseCompanyId","required":true,"label":"%E9%87%87%E8%B4%AD%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8ID","exampleValue":"65921"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"purchaseCompanyName","required":true,"maxLength":"100","label":"%E9%87%87%E8%B4%AD%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E6%B1%9F%E8%A5%BF%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%A6%E9%99%84%E5%B1%9E%E5%8C%BB%E5%AD%A6%E9%99%A2%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"supplierArchiveSeqId","required":true,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88ID","exampleValue":"65924"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supplierArchiveName","required":true,"maxLength":"100","label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E7%A6%8F%E5%BB%BA%E7%9C%81%E9%A3%9F%E5%93%81%E8%BF%90%E8%BE%93%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","required":true,"name":"inventoryList","label":"%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","maxLength":"100"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"inventoryCode","label":"%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"100","exampleValue":"%22INV2025071804522965%22","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"inventoryDate","required":true,"label":"%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"%222025-08-28%2018%3A34%3A00%22","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customFieldValues","label":"%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B 20%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%8D%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8715%E4%BD%8D%EF%BC%8C%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0%E4%B8%8D%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%876%E4%BD%8D","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productPackaging","label":"%E5%8C%85%E8%A3%85","maxLength":"255","exampleValue":"%224%E7%93%B6%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productSpecification","label":"%E8%A7%84%E6%A0%BC%E5%9E%8B%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"255","exampleValue":"%226%E4%B8%AA%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productManufacturingEnterprise","label":"%E7%94%9F%E4%BA%A7%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A","maxLength":"255","exampleValue":"%22%E6%9D%AD%E5%B7%9E%E5%A8%83%E5%93%88%E5%93%88%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"productBatchNo","label":"%E7%94%9F%E4%BA%A7%E6%89%B9%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"150","exampleValue":"%22001%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"expiryDate","label":"%E6%9C%89%E6%95%88%E6%9C%9F%E6%88%AA%E6%AD%A2%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","desc":"%20%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BA%EF%BC%9Ayyyy-MM-dd","exampleValue":"%222025-07-30%22"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"invoiceNumber","label":"%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%9A%84%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%2212457890%22","desc":"%20%E5%A4%9A%E5%BC%A0%E5%8F%91%E7%A5%A8%E5%BB%BA%E8%AE%AE%E7%94%A8%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%E9%9A%94%E5%BC%80%EF%BC%8C%E5%A6%82%E2%80%9D1234%2C2321412%E2%80%9C","maxLength":"500"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customFieldValues","label":"%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%80%BC"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fieldCode","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22INPUT_100553748%22","required":true,"maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fieldValue","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%9A%84%E5%80%BC","desc":"","exampleValue":"%22DIY%22","required":false,"maxLength":"1500"}}],"open":true}],"open":false}],"open":false}]}]</res

 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"maxLength":"","label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9Atrue%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9Afalse"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E4%BB%A5%E4%B8%8B%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E9%87%8D%E5%A4%8D%EF%BC%9AshippingDetailCode1%22","desc":"%20%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%85%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","required":true,"name":"returnCode","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22SUC0000%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR1%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR2%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9ASUC0000%0A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%9AE0002"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","required":false,"name":"body","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"shippingDetailCode","label":"%E5%8F%91%E8%B4%A7%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"%22INV1234567%22","required":true,"maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"result","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%9D%A1%E6%98%8E%E7%B

### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": [
        {
            "result": true,
            "shippingDetailCode": "snd309705124584910848",
            "errorMessage": null
        },
        {
            "result": true,
            "shippingDetailCode": "snd308768046472761344",
            "errorMessage": null
        }
    ],
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true
}
```
```json
{
    "body": [],
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": false,
    "message": "以下预入库单号重复：20250829-2;"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | EROOR2| 业务执行错误| 参考errorMessage错误信息字段|
  | EROOR1| 系统错误| 稍后再试，或联系开发人员|
  | E0002| 单次导入入库单数量不能超过100条| 控制入库单导入数量小于100|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/import

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/import

接口描述

功能描述： 将预入库信息导入至采购付款应用。

接口注意事项：批量导入接口，允许部分成功，导入上限为100。

采购付款与连接器的jiao'hu流程图如下：

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON
